ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( $Profile.Name = "SW Sales Internal", $Profile.Name = "SW SDR", $Profile.Name = "SW SDR Extended" ), ISCHANGED(OwnerId), $User.Id = OwnerId, OR( LastActivityDate >= (TODAY() - 30), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Active"), Number_Of_Open_Meetings__c <> 0, Number_of_Open_Opps__c <> 0 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You don’t have permission to transfer this record due to recent activity / open opportunity / open meeting / account is active
